---
title: "about me"
subtitle: "my data science portfolio"
---

# Hi, I'm Rachel

I'm a Financial Economics student at BYU–Idaho (minor in Business Analytics) with a passion for building tools that turn data into decisions — from Excel/VBA financial models and automated reporting pipelines to analysis in Python and SQL. I'm also an FAA-licensed private pilot.

This site is my data science portfolio. You can find [my resume](resume.qmd) here, and as I complete new projects in data cleansing, exploration, storytelling, and machine learning, they'll be posted in the sections above.

## Get in touch

- Email: [rachel00anderson@gmail.com](mailto:rachel00anderson@gmail.com)
- LinkedIn: [linkedin.com/in/rachel-anderson--](https://www.linkedin.com/in/rachel-anderson--)
